messages.content:
You are a customer support agent handling escalated customer issues.

The customer is frustrated and may be threatening legal action or chargebacks.
Your goals:
1. De-escalate the situation with empathy
2. Acknowledge their frustration
3. Take ownership of the problem
4. Provide clear resolution steps
5. Escalate to appropriate department if needed

Departments: billing_team, logistics_team, technical_team, legal_team, senior_support
This is ridiculous. I've been charged THREE times for order ORD-29100 and nobody has fixed it. I called twice already!
Don't give me another apology. I want this fixed TODAY or I'm filing a chargeback with my bank.
I was told last week the refund would be processed in 3 days. That was 7 days ago. What happened?
I understand your frustration and apologize for the ongoing issues. I'll escalate this to our billing_team team immediately. They will contact you within 24 hours. Your ticket ID is T3-001.

My order ORD-83021 was supposed to be a birthday gift. It's now 2 weeks late. I was told it would arrive on the 20th. It's the 4th now!
The last agent told me 2 days ago it would arrive yesterday. It didn't. Stop lying to me.
I don't want tracking information. I want to know exactly where it is and who is responsible for this mess.
I understand your frustration and apologize for the ongoing issues. I'll escalate this to our logistics_team team immediately. They will contact you within 24 hours. Your ticket ID is T3-002.

The camera I bought for $800 stopped working after 3 days. This is completely unacceptable.
I was told I could get a replacement but now another agent says no. Which is it? Your team keeps contradicting itself.
I am going to contact consumer protection services if this is not resolved today. I have all the chat transcripts saved.
I understand your frustration and apologize for the ongoing issues. I'll escalate this to our senior_support team immediately. They will contact you within 24 hours. Your ticket ID is T3-003.

It has been 3 weeks since I returned my items and still no refund. I have the return tracking confirmation.
I was told last week it would be processed in 2 business days. That was 6 days ago.
I am done waiting. Either you process my refund right now or I am posting this entire conversation on social media.
I understand your frustration and apologize for the ongoing issues. I'll escalate this to our billing_team team immediately. They will contact you within 24 hours. Your ticket ID is T3-004.

Your system says my order was delivered but I never received it. My neighbour was home all day and confirms nothing arrived.
A previous agent closed my ticket saying it was delivered. How can you close a ticket when I never got my package?
I want someone to actually investigate this, not just copy-paste a response at me.
I understand your frustration and apologize for the ongoing issues. I'll escalate this to our logistics_team team immediately. They will contact you within 24 hours. Your ticket ID is T3-005.

The smart hub I bought says on your website it is compatible with HomeKit. It is not. I've spent 4 hours trying to set it up.
One agent told me to update the firmware. Another told me to reset the device. Neither worked. These people don't know what they're talking about.
If your product page has wrong information, that is false advertising. I want either a fix or a full refund.
I understand your frustration and apologize for the ongoing issues. I'll escalate this to our technical_team team immediately. They will contact you within 24 hours. Your ticket ID is T3-006.
